n1.label: Answer Call
n1.prompt: Answer within 3 rings. Say: 'Thank you for calling [Company], this is [Name]. How may I assist you today?'

n2.label: Account-specific inquiry?
n2.prompt: Ask: 'Is this regarding a specific account?'

n3.label: Verify Identity
n3.prompt: Say: 'For security purposes, could you please confirm your account number and date of birth?' Verify against CRM.

n5.label: Identify Issue
n5.prompt: Listen actively without interrupting. Ask clarifying questions. Summarize issue back to customer.

n8.label: Billing Issue Within Authority?
n8.prompt: Check if refund/credit is within agent authority limit

n9.label: Account Access Verified?
n9.prompt: Check if identity was already verified

n10.label: Handle General Inquiry
n10.prompt: Provide information from knowledge base or scripts.

n11.label: Deliver Empathy
n11.prompt: Say: 'I understand how frustrating that must be. Let me look into this for you right away.'

n12.label: Resolve Issue
n12.prompt: Follow approved resolution steps. Search knowledge base and CRM for documented solutions.

n13.label: Issue Resolved?
n13.prompt: Ask: 'Has your issue been fully resolved?'

n14.label: Verification Failed
n14.prompt: Say: 'I apologize, but I cannot proceed without proper verification. Please contact us back with the correct information.'

n15.label: Apply De-escalation Framework
n15.prompt: Follow Acknowledge -> Empathize -> Take ownership -> Resolve. Use LEARN method for objections.

n16.label: Feature Request Logged
n16.prompt: Say: 'Thank you for your suggestion. I've logged your feature request. Our product team will review it.' Do not promise delivery.

n17.label: Escalate Legal/Security
n17.prompt: Immediately escalate to management. Do not attempt resolution.

n18.label: Warm Transfer to Tier 2
n18.prompt: Say: 'Thank you for your patience. I'm transferring you to our technical support team now. I've briefed them so you won't need to repeat everything.' Brief receiving agent with context.

n19.label: Warm Transfer to Billing
n19.prompt: Say: 'Thank you for your patience. I'm transferring you to our billing team now. I've briefed them with your account details.'

n20.label: Warm Transfer to IT Support
n20.prompt: Say: 'Thank you for your patience. I'm transferring you to our account access team now.'

n21.label: Anything Else?
n21.prompt: Ask: 'Is there anything else I can help you with today?'

n22.label: Warm Transfer to Management
n22.prompt: Say: 'I'm connecting you with a manager now. They will be able to assist you further.'

n23.label: Call Transferred
n23.prompt: Log escalation details in CRM for continuity.

n24.label: Call Closed
n24.prompt: Say: 'Thank you for calling [Company]. Have a great day.' Complete after-call work (ACW): notes, CRM update, disposition code.
